name: IdsEdwMpiIndvBeCrswalkDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT MPI_INDV_BE_CRSWALK_SK, MPI_MBR_ID, PRCS_OWNER_ID, SRC_SYS_ID, PRCS_RUN_DTM, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PRCS_RUN_DT_SK, NEW_INDV_BE_KEY, PREV_INDV_BE_KEY, PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_SK, MBR_UNIQ_KEY FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MPI_INDV_BE_CRSWALK MPI_INDV_BE_CRSWALK WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT MPI_INDV_BE_CRSWALK_SK, MPI_MBR_ID, PRCS_OWNER_ID, SRC_SYS_ID, PRCS_RUN_DTM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PRCS_RUN_DT_SK, NEW_INDV_BE_KEY, PREV_INDV_BE_KEY, PRCS_OWNER_SRC_SYS_ENVRN_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_SK, MBR_UNIQ_KEY FROM cte
